_comment: OSI-approved SPDX identifiers (CLAUDE.md constitutional constraint). Hand-curated permissive list. GPL family deliberately excluded -- adding it requires an ADR (mirrors PM2/AGPL-3.0 rejection in CLAUDE.md). FSL, BSL, Anthropic Commercial Terms, and other source-available licenses are constitutionally rejected.

_excluded_explicitly._comment: OSI-approved but excluded for project policy reasons. Override requires an ADR.
_excluded_explicitly.GPL-2.0: viral copyleft; excluded by default (mirrors CLAUDE.md PM2/AGPL precedent)

_rejected.FSL-1.1-MIT: Functional Source License; source-available, NOT OSI
_rejected.BSL-1.1: Business Source License; source-available, NOT OSI

_exceptions_comment: Per-package overrides for transitive dependencies of dev tooling. Each entry pins an exact name@version and a license string -- if either changes (e.g. transitive bumps to a different license), the audit will fail loudly. BlueOak-1.0.0 is OSI-approved (https://opensource.org/license/blue-oak-model-license, approved 2019) but is intentionally kept off the main allow-list to require explicit acknowledgement. CC-BY-3.0 is NOT OSI-approved; the two SPDX-data packages here use it for their data files (not code), and they reach the tree only as transitive deps of license-checker-rseidelsohn, our own license-CI tool. Reviewed and accepted as an unavoidable bootstrap dependency.

exceptions.reason: Transitive dep of license-checker-rseidelsohn. BlueOak-1.0.0 is OSI-approved (2019).
Transitive dep of license-checker-rseidelsohn. BlueOak-1.0.0 is OSI-approved (2019).

Transitive dep of license-checker-rseidelsohn (the license-CI tool itself). CC-BY-3.0 is a Creative Commons attribution license used here for SPDX exception data, not code. Bootstrap exception.
Transitive dep of license-checker-rseidelsohn (the license-CI tool itself). Dual-licensed; CC-BY-3.0 portion covers SPDX data files. Bootstrap exception.
